opportunities.title: Smart India Hackathon (SIH) 2026
opportunities.description: India's biggest national hackathon solving product development and digital solutions problems. Highly recognized for VIT Bhopal students.

opportunities.description: A global program focused on bringing student developers into open-source software development. Work on computational data science or ML tools.

opportunities.title: Hugging Face Deep RL and NLP Course

opportunities.title: Major League Hacking (MLH) Hackathon Season

opportunities.title: TCS CodeVita 2026 - Global Coding Contest

opportunities.title: Microsoft Imagine Cup 2026

opportunities.title: Amazon ML Challenge 2026

opportunities.title: Google Girl Hackathon 2026
opportunities.description: A coding and system design challenge for female engineering students across India, designed to create a pipeline for internship and full-time hiring.

opportunities.title: Kaggle Active Data Science Competitions
opportunities.description: Solve challenging machine learning problems on real datasets. Gold/Silver medals are highly respected on resumes for Data Science roles.

opportunities.title: LeetCode Weekly & Biweekly Contests
